sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68668" key="monosxhmate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-σχημᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n68668.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be in simple aspect</tr_>, Critodem. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).201</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
